title: Better Leaves
description: Better Leaves makes leaves bushier, to look more round and adds detail to trees
body:
# Upgrade Your Game with Better Leaves

Make your game world look even better with Better Leaves. It adds more details to the leaves, making them thicker and more rounded.

This will work well with Fast Leaves, but it might not look exactly as planned.

**Note:**
Better Leaves can affect how well your game runs. Be aware that it might make your game slower, so choose settings that balance good visuals with smooth gameplay.
